message:
✨ feat(drasi): Wave A — CRUD loop, install CTA, YAML export (#8186)

* ✨ feat(drasi): Wave A — CRUD loop, install CTA, YAML export (#7870)

Follow-up to the Drasi integration (#8158, #8163) finishing out the
read→write story the Drasi PM has been asking about.

What changed in DrasiReactiveGraph:

- + buttons on Sources/Continuous Queries/Reactions column headers.
  Sources and Queries open their Configure modal in create mode (null
  resource = empty defaults + POST instead of PUT). Reactions create a
  default SSE reaction wired to all current queries.
- Delete (trash) button on every node card when a live backend is
  configured (and in demo mode too for consistency). Confirm dialog
  before any DELETE; wired through the existing /api/drasi/proxy.
- Download YAML inside the Source and Query config modals (edit mode
  only — create mode has nothing to serialize yet). Uses the existing
  lib/download.ts helper and js-yaml which were already in the tree.
- Gears now work in live mode. Phase 2 left them demo-only because the
  proxy PUT path was unverified; Wave A verifies it and turns them on.
- "Install Drasi" CTA banner above the card whenever no live Drasi is
  detected. Button deep-links to /missions/install-drasi via the
  existing mission-deep-link pattern (LocalClustersSection.tsx).

Backend + proxy are unchanged — every Wave A action reuses the generic
reverse proxy shipped in #8158.

i18n: new drasi.* keys for the add/create/delete/download/install
strings. en only; other locales stay on the English fallback.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix(drasi): i18n aria-label for delete button to clear ratchet

ts-null-safety Pattern 5 (non-localized strings) flagged the new trash
icon on NodeControls because its aria-label and title were hardcoded.
Wire them through t('actions.delete') — the key already exists in the
shared actions block.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
